capture_commands:
mkdir -p packages/chip/docs/evidence/android/security && state=$(adb -s "$CHIP_ANDROID_ADB_HOSTPORT" shell getprop ro.boot.verifiedbootstate | tr -d '') && if [ "$state" = green ]; then result=0; verdict=pass; else result=1; verdict=fail; fi; printf 'VERIFIED_BOOT=%s
STATE=%s
RESULT=%s
' "$verdict" "$state" "$result" | tee packages/chip/docs/evidence/android/security/verified_boot_acceptance.log; test "$result" = 0
planned_evidence_templates.required_capture: boot a production-key eliza_ai_soc Android target and record verified-boot state from the live target
success_criteria: required verified-boot success markers are present
no forbidden BLOCKED or FAIL markers are present

planned_evidence_templates.required_capture: run the approved tampered boot image rejection flow against production verified-boot policy
success_criteria: required tamper-rejection success markers are present
no forbidden BLOCKED, FAIL, or image-acceptance markers are present

planned_evidence_templates.required_capture: run the approved older rollback-index image rejection flow against rollback policy
success_criteria: required rollback-rejection success markers are present
no forbidden BLOCKED, FAIL, or image-acceptance markers are present

planned_evidence_templates.required_capture: record production debug-lock and key-provisioning state from the target provisioning flow
success_criteria: required debug-lock and production-key success markers are present
no forbidden BLOCKED, FAIL, test-key, or development-key markers are present

planned_evidence_templates.required_capture: calibrated sustained NPU workload power, thermal, frequency, and throttle trace from a booted riscv64 target
